tr.td: Urea nitrogen [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma
Carbon dioxide, total [Moles/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All measured parameters are within normal limits except for creatinine, which is elevated, indicating possible impaired renal function. Other kidney-related markers (urea nitrogen, electrolytes) are normal. Recommend clinical correlation and further evaluation of renal function, including assessment for chronic kidney disease or acute kidney injury.

text.div: Provider Organization: Centro Privado de Educación Especial Parálisis Cerebral Infantil
